servers.name: Tavily
servers.description_zh: 实时网页搜索、智能数据提取和网站爬取
servers.description_en: Real-time web search, intelligent data extraction and web crawling

servers.name: GitHub
servers.description_zh: GitHub 平台集成：仓库、Issues、PR、Actions 管理
servers.description_en: GitHub platform integration: repos, issues, PRs, Actions management

servers.name: GitLab
servers.description_zh: GitLab API 集成：项目管理、合并请求、流水线
servers.description_en: GitLab API integration: project management, merge requests, pipelines

servers.name: Context7
servers.description_zh: 为 AI 编程提供最新的库文档和代码示例
servers.description_en: Up-to-date library documentation and code examples for AI coding

servers.name: Google Drive
servers.description_zh: Google Drive 文件访问和搜索，自动导出 Workspace 文件
servers.description_en: Google Drive file access and search with auto-export for Workspace files

servers.name: Gmail
servers.description_zh: Gmail 邮件管理：读取、发送、搜索邮件，支持自动认证
servers.description_en: Gmail management: read, send, search emails with auto authentication

servers.name: Google Calendar
servers.description_zh: Google Calendar 日程管理：创建、查询、更新日历事件
servers.description_en: Google Calendar management: create, query, update calendar events

servers.name: Notion
servers.description_zh: Notion API：搜索、创建/更新页面、管理数据库
servers.description_en: Notion API: search, create/update pages, manage databases

servers.name: Slack
servers.description_zh: Slack 工作区：频道管理、消息发送、用户查询
servers.description_en: Slack workspace: channel management, messaging, user queries

servers.name: TodoList
servers.description_zh: 任务管理：创建、更新、完成和组织待办事项
servers.description_en: Task management: create, update, complete and organize to-do items

servers.name: Playwright
servers.description_zh: 高级浏览器自动化，支持 Chromium/Firefox/WebKit

servers.name: Figma
servers.description_zh: Figma 设计平台集成：读取文件、组件、样式，支持设计稿解析
servers.description_en: Figma design platform integration: read files, components, styles, and parse designs

servers.name: Canva
servers.description_zh: Canva 设计平台：创建和管理设计、模板操作
servers.description_en: Canva design platform: create and manage designs, template operations

servers.name: Firecrawl
servers.description_zh: 网页抓取与数据提取：支持批处理、结构化提取和内容分析
servers.description_en: Web scraping and data extraction: batch processing, structured extraction and content analysis

servers.name: Fetch
servers.description_zh: 网页内容抓取和 HTML 转 Markdown，适合 LLM 消费
servers.description_en: Web content fetching and HTML-to-markdown conversion for LLM consumption
